teachingPoint: Compliance audit records are append-only and PLATFORM_ONLY. deleteDocument and updateDocument are BLOCKED on the compliance audit index. retentionExpiresAt MUST be computed and stored AT WRITE TIME — not lazily computed at read time. Corrections via reversal records only.
ironRules: retentionExpiresAt computed at write time from FREEDOM config retention_period_days
Corrections via reversal records only — never modify original
codeSnippet: const retentionDays = await this.freedomConfig.get('compliance_retention_days'); const retentionExpiresAt = new Date(Date.now() + retentionDays * 86400000).toISOString(); await this.db.storeDocument(COMPLIANCE_AUDIT_INDEX, {...record, retentionExpiresAt, knowledgeScope:'PRIVATE'});
